highlights: Tokenized branding lets color/type changes propagate across the full interface quickly.
Reusable section architecture accelerates campaign and landing-page assembly.
Focused on maintainable front-end patterns over one-off page builds.
impact: Cut page setup time for new content and promotions while maintaining consistent brand presentation.
one_liner: Reusable web foundation for Altitude Nutrition marketing and content experiences.
problem: Nutrition-site iterations were slowed by repeatedly rebuilding common UI patterns for each new page.
solution: Implemented a design-system-driven React/Tailwind starter with centralized theme controls and reusable UI sections.
title: Altitude Nutrition Web System
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
